calendar.matters:
Petition Fpr Order Requiring Eisen Trust To Pay Compensatuon For Professional Services Rendered To Decedent Lucy Eisen, Settlor Of Eisen Trust.
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for and with Ken Eisen. Richard Grabstein for Ellen Eisen (Trustee). Arnold Weber for Deborah Dacumos.

The Court stated that the way to proceed was to consolidate this action with case number 290775. Mr. Grabstein objected stating that the petition was in the nature of a civil complaint and that it should be dismissed without prejudice. Mr. Weber stated that it was filed separately as there was a concern about statute running and that he would not oppose consolidation. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
